title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 10 June 2022
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 10 June 2022
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 10 June 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 11/06/2022
The Ship Recycling market remains motionless with barely any activity being witnessed due to lack of tonnage being offered
Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2022-06-11_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report_10_June_2022.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2022-06-11_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report_10_June_2022.pdf

[Page 1]
WEEKLY
hekllenic
SHIP
R ECYCLING
REPORT
3rd June to 10th June 2022
Highlights of the Week
Th e Ship Recycling market remains motionless with barely any activity being
jhhnhu
witnessed due to lack of tonnage being offered combined with a significant
gap in the price expectations of the ship owners and the recyclers. In the
subcontinent market, buying inquiries have started coming from Bangladesh
and Pakistan as their inventories continue to shrink, leading to an increase
in offer prices by about USD 10/LDT, while the steel prices continue to
decline in India, leading to a further softening of offer prices by USD 10/LDT. Going forward, we are cautiously optimistic that the offer prices will remain
stable with a chance to move northwards if the shortage of tonnage persists.
